nasb.text: When I heard these words, I sat down and wept and mourned for days; and I was fasting and praying before the God of heaven.

esv.text: As soon as I heard these words I sat down and wept and mourned for days, and I continued fasting and praying before the God of heaven.

cnv.text: 我聽見了這些事，就坐下哭泣，悲傷了好幾天，在天上的　神面前禁食禱告，

ccb.text: 我一听见这消息，就坐下痛哭，悲伤了好几天。我在天上的上帝面前禁食祷告，说：
